column2: - At GTCO, we operate an inclusive system that provides equal employment opportunities for

column1: all. Through our strategic credit model, we lend to businesses across development-oriented sectors to
promote sustainable economic growth and decent work for all. Through this model, we are able to indirectly
provide more job opportunities for people. This is in addition to the direct job that we create through
recruitment of staff to meet the needs of our customers. We continue to offer competitive salary and benefits
to promote decent living for all our employees.
